ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "signature_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment signature */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compound used in the experiment */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell line used in the experiment */,
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concentration level used */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time point used */,
  "similarity" REAL /* Similarity score of the experiment */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was last updated */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment for easier identification */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experimental design */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the experimental results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES times ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_concentration_id FOREIGN KEY ("concentration_id") REFERENCES concentrations ("concentration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compound */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compound was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compound was last updated */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number for the compound */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* InChI key for the compound */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from which the compound was sourced */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the cell line */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Tissue type of the cell line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cell line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cell line was last updated */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Information about any genetic modifications in the cell line */,
  "growth_media" TEXT /* Media used for growing the cell line */,
  "growth_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for growing the cell line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concentrations" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration level */,
  "concentration_value" TEXT /* Value of the concentration */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the concentration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concentration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the concentration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the concentration was last updated */,
  "concentration_range" TEXT /* Range of concentrations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "time_value" TEXT /* Value of the time */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the time */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the time point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the time point was last updated */,
  "time_range" TEXT /* Range of time points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF, ZIP) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., informational, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the alias belongs to */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Name of the alias */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alias was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alias was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_aliases_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_line_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line the alias belongs to */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Name of the alias */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alias was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alias was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_line_aliases_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id")
)
